title: schoenorchis fragrans
intro: Schoenorchis fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Shoal Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Schoenorchis fragrans include its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Schoenorchis fragrans is often prepared as an herbal decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine, highlighting its versatility and potential benefits.
